mapper.sql: p.id, p.thumbnail_url, p.name, p.price, p.stock_quantity, c.type
FROM products p JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products (thumbnail_url, category_id, name, price, stock_quantity) VALUES (#{product.thumbnailUrl}, #{product.categoryId}, #{product.name}, #{product.price}, #{product.stockQuantity})
